nodes.name: White-backed vulture
nodes.summary: White-backed vulture（White-backed vulture，学名 Gyps africanus），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，主要威胁包括猎捕压力。

nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Retrieved February 23, 2018, from http://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/j.1474-919X.2008.00878.x/full A contributing factor are broader changes in vegetation composition, such as woody plant encroachment, which can decrease hunting efficiency due to limited visibility.{{Cite journal |last=Malan |first=G
